description: Compositionadidas Techfit C& S long single jersey tights made of 84% polyester and 16% spandex, 25" inseam, soft elastic waist using UV50+, engineered using ClimaLite and Techfit technology, printed logo on right waist with heat transfer adidas benchmark on left leg hemFittingSlimWash careHand wash or machine washDesigned for that absolute comfort during work outs, these tights from Adidas are created using materials that ensure you have a fresh and comfortable feel all through. Engineered using a soft, stretchable polyester fabric, the tights stay snug and comfortably on the body. The soft elastic waist band is created with a UV 50+ protection that keeps the body safe from blsitering. The Formotion technology employed offers superior Fit and comfort, allowing the body to move naturally. Well ventilated, the ClimaLite allows you to stay dry and fresh all through the wear with an absolutely comfort fit, while the embroidered brand logo adds to the tights a sense of style. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
